metadata.limitation: Community centroid proxy, not official polygon boundary.
metadata.note: Replay hazard inputs are scenario-based approximations of named storm events, not measured GIS or weather-station observations. Values represent plausible storm severity profiles for validation of the triage ranking model, not exact historical meteorological data.

storm_events.label: Post-Tropical Fiona (Sep 2023)
storm_events.description: Scenario replay of Post-Tropical Fiona: extreme wind impact with prolonged duration and high coastal surge. Highest expected outage risk across wind-exposed communities.

storm_events.label: Post-Tropical Derry (Jul 2019)
storm_events.description: Scenario replay of Post-Tropical Derry: strong wind core with moderate rain. Expected to impact tree-exposure and coastal communities more severely than rain-driven ones.

storm_events.label: Winter Storm Heavy Rain (Jan 2024)
storm_events.description: Scenario replay of a heavy rain / moderate wind winter event. Expected to highlight lowland-exposure and coastal flooding communities over wind-vulnerable ones.

storm_events.label: Summer Squall (Aug 2022)
storm_events.description: Scenario replay of a short-duration summer squall. Expected to produce lower overall risk scores, useful for testing low-risk ranking behavior.

storm_events.label: Coastal Nor'easter (Oct 2021)
storm_events.description: Scenario replay of a prolonged coastal Nor'easter with high tide and sustained rain. Expected to elevate coastal-exposure communities in the top-K.
